channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Oracle 'Survivors' Reportedly Told to 'Stretch' After Massive Layoffs—But Workers Are Refusing Extra Hours - International Business Times UK
item.description:
1. Oracle 'Survivors' Reportedly Told to 'Stretch' After Massive Layoffs—But Workers Are Refusing Extra Hours  International Business Times UK
  2. Read the Email Oracle Is Sending to Laid-Off Employees  Business Insider
  3. Oracle cutting thousands in latest layoff round as company continues to ramp AI spending  CNBC
  4. Outrage as Oracle files thousands of foreign-worker requests amid layoff bloodbath  New York Post
  5. Kansas City Oracle campus cuts over 500 jobs for AI investment shift  FOX4KC.com
